title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Enhancements: smarter help without leaving the game
summary: Highlight improvements to the AI assistant integration, model switching, and a more persistent chat experience within CodeGrind to boost problem-solving flow.
core_message: CodeGrind now offers enhanced Azure OpenAI assistant capabilities, including multiple model support, resilient chat, and smoother problem-solving guidance directly in the coding workspace. This makes getting help faster without losing context in the editor.
cta: Try the updated AI assistant in your next practice session and share feedback on model switching and chat persistence.
visual_brief: Static UI-focused image showing the CodeGrind editor with an AI chat panel, model-switch toggle, and problem-solving hints overlaying the coding workspace; cyberpunk-inspired, clean, and legible.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
